texts.title: 시집살이노래-사촌성님
texts.original:
성님 성님 사춘 성님 나온다고 기념 마소
쌀 반되 제졌으믄 성도 묵고 나도 묵고
고초 화초 맵다뻘로 시집살이만 하오릴까

성내 갱토 꾸정물은 성소 주제 울소 주까

성내 채소 싸래기는 성닭 주제 울닭 주까
앞밭에는 상추 심어 뒷밭에는 고추 심어

고추 상추 맵다해도 시집살이만 다 못하대
texts.english:
Brother, brother, celebrating the arrival of puberty
If half the rice is cooked, both the eldest son and I will eat
Suffering and hardship are bitter, is it just a life of in-law struggles?
Angry mud and polluted water, as a sacred place, would it cry?
Angry vegetable scraps, as a sacred chicken, would it cry?
In the front field, lettuce is planted, in the back field, peppers are planted
Even if peppers and lettuce are spicy, it's still no worse than in-law struggles

texts.title: 시집살이노래
texts.original:
한 살 묵아 모친 죽고 두 살 묵아 부친 죽고

시우시 열다섯살 묵어가니 중신애비 왔다 갔다

시집이라꼬 가니까네 하늘같은 시아바시

나 작다고 나무래고 키 작다고 나무래네


시어마씨 거동 보소 허솔부솔 나가면서

나 작다고 나무래네 키 작다고 나무래네
사랑방에 아버님요 유리영창 햇볕 났네

세수탕에 세수하고 아침 조반 잡수셔요


에라 조년 요망한 년 너나 먹고 개나 줘라


건내방에 시누부야 유리영창 햇볕 났네

세수탕에 세수하고 아침 조반 잡수세요


명태같이 뚜딜 년아 접시같이 다닐 년아

니나 먹고 개나 줘라 서럼일세 서럼일세


내가 나서 서럼일세 한 절로 들어가니

늙은 중은 잠을 자고 젊은 중은 신 삼고


중아 중아 대사중아 요내 머리 깎아주세


깎아 무상 좋지마는 근본이 높아 못 깎을세

근본이사 높으나따나 요내 머리 깎아주세

한쪽머리 깎고나니 친정생각 절로나네


한쪽머리 마저 깎고 나니 친정 생각 절로 나네


중아중아 대사중아 백팔염줄 목에 걸고



친정곁을 동냥가세 동냥주소 동냥주소

딸애기는 빨래가고 며느리애기 동냥주소

중아 중아 대사중아 숲대밭에 왕대밭에 가니

아무도 없네
texts.english:
When I was one year old, my mother died, and when I was two, my father died.
When Si-woo-si was fifteen years old, the middle-aged father kept coming and going.
When I went to get married, the mother-in-law, who was like the sky,
scolded me for being small and scolded me for being short.


Look at the mother-in-law’s behavior, mumbling as she goes out,
scolding me for being small and scolding me for being short.
In the sarangbang (main room), Father is in the glass room with sunlight shining in,
washing his face and eating the morning meal.


“Ugh, you wicked woman, take it yourself or give it to the dogs.”

In the geonnaebang (inner room), sister-in-law is in the glass room with sunlight shining in,
washing her face and eating the morning meal.


“You shameless woman like dried pollock, walking like a plate,
take it yourself or give it to the dogs, it’s pitiful, so pitiful.”


I stepped forward, so pitiful, and entered a temple,
the old monk was sleeping and the young monk was wearing shoes,

“Monk, monk, great monk, please shave this child’s head.”


It’s good to shave, but because of high status, I can’t shave,
though the status is high, please shave this child’s head.
After shaving one side of my head, I naturally thought of my family home,
after shaving the other side, I naturally thought of my family home.


“Monk, monk, great monk, with the 108 prayer beads around my neck,
let’s go begging near my family home, please give alms, please give alms,
the daughter is off washing clothes, the daughter-in-law is begging,
monk, monk, great monk, going to the forest, the field, the king bamboo grove,
but there is no one there.”

texts.title: 시집살이노래
texts.original:
애 태웠냐 애 태우냐
받어논 날짜를 애 태우냐
왜 생겼냐 왜 생겼냐
너다지 곱게도 왜 생겼냐
texts.english:
Are you worried or are you worried?
The date you received, are you worried?
Why did it appear, why did it appear?
Why did it appear so nicely on you?

texts.title: 시집살이노래-사촌성님
texts.original:
아 성아 사촌성아 시집살이 어떻더노
시집살이 좋다마는 주우벗은 시아자비
말하기가 어렵더라
도래도래 도래판에 수저놓기 어렵더라
조그마는 수박씨끼 밥당기도 어렵더라
texts.english:
Seong-ah Seong-ah, cousin Seong-ah, how is married life?
Married life is good, but my mother-in-law is strict.
It is difficult to speak.
It is difficult to place the spoon on the wooden tray.
It is even difficult to eat a small watermelon seed.

texts.title: 시집살이노래
texts.original:
가기싫은 시집이라고 가였드니야
울도담도 없는 시집살이 공방살이가 웬말인고
texts.english:
I was forced into a marriage I didn’t want,
What kind of life is this, with no tears or comfort, just a harsh life of a married woman?

texts.title: 신세타령
texts.original:
어떤사람은 팔자가 좋아 면일 장주를 하건만은

요놈 내팔자 와이렇소
뒷동산 올감서 지게목발 두들리고

아이고 아고 내팔자 내팔자가 외이렇노
지제목발 드들리고 줄령태산을 넘나들고
texts.english:
Some people are fortunate and have a good fate, no matter what they do.
But what’s with my fate being like this?
Climbing the back hill, pounding with a shoulder pole and crutches,
Oh dear, oh dear, why is my fate like this?
Now pounding with a wooden crutch, crossing over tall mountains.

texts.title: 시집살이노래
texts.original:
살이 살이 시집살이
살으드록 살락했더이
공덕같은 요내 몸이
몰대같이 몰라진다

꼬막같은 요내 입이
단내 나고 쓴내 난다
샛별같은 요내 눈에
안개 져서 비가 오네

하늘에서 오는 비는
만인간이 다 알건만
요내 눈에 오는 비는
한품의 든님도 몰라주네
texts.english:
Living as a wife-in-law,
Living and living,
My body, which once seemed like a blessing,
Is fading away like an ox-hide bag.

My mouth, like a cockle,
Tastes both sweet and bitter.
In my eyes, like the morning star,
Fog forms and rain falls.

Everyone knows
the rain that comes from the sky,
But the rain that falls in my eyes,
Even my beloved cannot understand.

texts.title: 시집살이노래
texts.original:
어매 어매 우리 어매
날 여울때는 잘사라고 날 여웠는디

놈난시에 나도 낳고
나난시에 놈도 낳건마는
나는 어채 이란다여
날 데려 갈적에는

덕석갓에 새만 보라고 하더니
못살겄네 못살겄네
이세상을 어이를 하라요
하레죙일 밭을 매고

심에다가
장사리 밥을 내가 주니
못살겄어요
texts.english:
Mother, mother, my mother
When I was young, she wanted me to live well, that’s what she wished
When the boy was born, so was I
When I was born, so was the boy
But I don’t know why this is so
When she was taking me away

She told me to look at the birds on the straw hat
I cannot live, I cannot live
What am I to do with this world?
Working all day long in the fields


I gave rice to the shopkeeper
I cannot live anymore

texts.title: 시집살이노래
texts.original:
우리도 집안 가풍이 여북에 주믄
고깔을 씨구 머리를 깎구 …씨구 절루 가랴

일곱폭 치마를 한폭은 뜯어서 고깔 짓구
한폭은 뜯어서 허리에 두르구
한폭은 뜯어서 바랑 짓구
한폭은 뜯어서 감발하구

올라가네 올러가네
높으네 산중 스님찾아 올러를 가네
느 집안 가풍이 여북에 주믄
머리를 깎구 절루를 가느냐
texts.english:
In our family tradition, when the new year comes,
we make a pointed hat and shave the head... then go to the temple.
One piece of a seven-panel skirt is torn to make the hat,
one panel is torn to wrap around the waist,
one panel is torn to make a bag,
one panel is torn to make a headband.

Going up, going up,
going up to find a monk in the high mountain.
In our family tradition, when the new year comes,
do we shave the head and go to the temple?

texts.title: 신세타령
texts.original:
아깝다 내 청춘아
청춘은 간곳 없고
백발이 휘날려서
백발을 막을라고
한손에는 망치들고
한손에는 절대들고
아무리 허여도
백발을 못 막겄네
그 백발을 못 막겄네

-흥그레타령
texts.english:
What a waste, my youth
Youth is nowhere to be found
White hair is blowing in the wind
To stop the white hair
Holding a hammer in one hand
Holding a chisel in the other
No matter how much effort I put in
I can’t stop the white hair
I can’t stop that white hair

-Heunggre Tales

texts.title: 시집살이노래
texts.original:
애 태웠냐 애 태우냐
받어논 날짜를 애 태우냐
왜 생겼냐 왜 생겼냐
너다지 곱게도 왜 생겼냐
texts.english:
Are you worried or are you worried?
The date you received, are you worried?
Why did it appear, why did it appear?
Why did it appear so nicely on you?

texts.title: 시집살이노래
texts.original:
가설일래 가설일래 우리나 시누 남편 가살일래

우리 문전 지냄서로 부채 챙연 허고 가네

우리도야 꼬사리 꺾어다 지붕시고
누룩으로 죽담싸고 원추리로 대문 달고

고대 공실 높은집이 니 귀에다 핑경달고

어느 바람이 드리부니 우리도 한때 살아본다
대문 아케 저 처자야 뉘 간장을 뇍일라고

저리나 곱게도 생겼느냐 내가 무신 곱소리요
내가 무신 곱소리오 단장안에 꽃이로세
texts.english:
Whether it is a hypothesis or a hypothesis, is my sister-in-law’s husband a fraud?
They guard the house, collecting debts from one another and leaving.
We too break off branches to make a roof,
Wrap rice straw with yeast, and hang daylilies on the gate.

In ancient times, a high house hung its window shutters on your ears as decoration.
When a certain wind blows, we too live for a while.
Opening the gate, young lady, whose soy sauce are you going to marinate?
You look so lovely, what am I to say?
What am I to say? In the room, you are a flower.

texts.title: 시집살이노래
texts.original:
해다지고 다저문날 삼십골로 감잡느니

오른손을 받은편지 왼손을 대이보니 부모죽은 편지로다

집에 와서 물은 끼네 바하 당송 하고 가라 처답 당송 하고 가라

그러고로 다 해 놓고 가니께 강문을 닫았는데

아홉상제 맏오라베 강문쪼게 열어두라

어지거지 편지갈때 못오더나
아홉상제 맏올채야 강문쪼께 열어주라

이지기지 보고갈때 뭣하고 오늘 왔노 강문을

아홉상제 맏올채야 강문쪼끼 열어주라


비단공상 다 우짜고 헌두디기 입히났노
그러고 시가집에 가니 쑥대밭이 되어 있더란다


맹화 당년에 꽃을 잃고 꽃을 찾아 내 왔노라

풍파에 배를 잃고 배를 찾아 내 왔노라
texts.english:
On the day the moon was full, I went to Samsipgol to get a sense of things.
I received a letter in my right hand and held it with my left; it was a letter informing me of my parents’ death.
I came home and boiled water, reciting the Tang dynasty poem Ba Ha, then left; I replied with the Tang dynasty poem Cheo Dap, then left.
Having taken care of everything, I closed the river gate.

The eldest son of the nine ancestral rites said, "Open the river gate a little."
When the confusing letter came, I could not come.
The eldest son of the nine ancestral rites said, "Open the river gate a little."
When visiting, why are you here today, standing at the river gate?
The eldest son of the nine ancestral rites said, "Open the river gate a little."

All the silk boxes—what should I do? I put on old clothes.
Then, when I went to the wife's house, it was like a field of mugwort.

In the year of the magnolia blossom, I lost the flower and came to find it.
In the storm, I lost the boat and came to find it.

texts.title: 시집살이노래-사촌성님
texts.original:
성님성님 사춘성님
시집살이 어떻든가
시집살이 좋데만은
행지초매 죽반인기
콧물눈물 다 쳐졌네()
분질같은 요내 얼굴
미나라꽃이 다 되었네
삼단같은 요내 머리
비스르춤이 다 되었네
은가락지 차던 손질
호무짤기 다 되었네
texts.english:
Brother, brother, dear brother-in-law
How is living in the in-laws' house?
Though living in the in-laws' house is said to be good,
With hardships and distress,
Runny nose and tears have all fallen away.
This face, like a wildflower,
Has become like a radish blossom.
This hair, like three layers,
Has become tangled and messy.
The hands that wore silver rings,
Have become rough and calloused.

texts.title: 시집살이노래-사촌성님
texts.original:
성님성님 시집살이 어떻딥까
시집살이 삼년만에
고추당추 맵다해도
시집살이 더 매우리
물명지초마 열두폭이 휏대끝에서
눈물콧물에 다 썩었소
성님성님 사촌성님
친정에는 열두달에
한번도 못 가봤소

삼년오년 지나가도
친정엄마 얼굴 한번 못 봤네
texts.english:
Brother, brother, how is life after marriage?
After three years of married life,
Even if the peppers are said to be spicy,
Married life is even spicier.
At the edge of the twelve-panel folding screen in the living room,
Tears and mucus have all rotted it.
Brother, brother, cousin brother,
I have never been able to visit my parental home even once in twelve months.
Even after three or five years have passed,
I have never seen my mother's face even once.
